Office_Intro.text: {bg:Office}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}{showTextbox}September 17{nl}Joypolis Office{sprite:Sahwit["Stand"]}{hideCharacter}{fadeInCharacter}{startBGM:grossberg,true}

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,false}{color:white}Mr. Sahwit.{nl}May I ask you a few questions?

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}Of course. As the first person to discover the body,{nl}I will gladly cooperate.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,false}First of all...{nl}what kind of relationship did you have with the victim,{nl}Ms. Nakaki?

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}I am the chief of this event hall.{nl}Ms. Nakaki was one of our staff members.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Samurai2}{showTextbox}She was the stunt performer for the Steel Samurai show,{nl}and she was extremely devoted to it...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: She said she wanted to make the show even better,{nl}and practiced inside the building late every night.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Byrde_Kurumi}{showTextbox}I never imagined...{nl}that her passion would end up angering the security guard,{p:150} Ms. Maggey Byrde.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeInCharacter:250}{fadeBg:Office,100}{showTextbox}{blip:1,false}Could you tell me more about that?

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}Well,{p:150} from a security guard's perspective,{p:150} having someone practicing inside the facility after hours is quite the nuisance.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: She often argued with Ms. Nakaki,{nl}telling her things like,{p:150} "Please just go home early."

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: Once they started arguing,{nl}they'd both get incredibly heated...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: So I thought it over,{p:150} and decided to have{nl}the two of them sit down and talk it out.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: However,{p:150} just before that discussion could happen,{nl}that terrible incident occurred...

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,false}Please tell me in detail what you saw{nl}that day as the first witness.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}On the day of the incident,{p:150} I told both of them to come{nl}to the 4th floor of the event hall at 10:00 PM.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {playSound:cling}{flash}{blip:1,false}Why 10:00 PM?{nl}That's a full hour after closing.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}Ms. Byrde said that time would be best because she wanted to write up the security log and take a shower first.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: Then Ms. Nakaki chimed in,{p:150} saying she wanted{nl}to practice for the show during that time...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: I,{p:150} as the chief,{p:150} was taking care of various miscellaneous administrative tasks...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: It was about fifteen minutes after closing,{p:150} I suppose.{nl}I went down to the first-floor stage and waited for the time to come.

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,false}I see...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {blip:1,true}Then,{p:150} I heard the two of them{nl}arguing from the floor above.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Byrde_Samurai}{showTextbox}When I looked up,{p:150} I saw Ms. Byrde{nl}push Ms. Nakaki down from the 4th floor.

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:Crime_Scene}{showTextbox}And then,{p:150} Ms. Nakaki fell right before my very eyes.{p:500}{nl}She never woke up again...

Office_Intro.name: Sahwit
Office_Intro.text: Ugh...

Office_Intro.name: Phoenix
Office_Intro.text: {hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeInCharacter:250}{fadeBg:Office,100}{showTextbox}{blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(Is there anything else I should ask about?){setState:office_intro_done,true}{sectionEnd}

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {blip:1,false}{color:white}Right. On the day of the incident,{nl}did you hear any suspicious sounds?

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Sahwit
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {sprite:Sahwit["Nervous"]}{blip:1,true}Ah.{p:500}{nl}If you mean that,{p:150} I clearly heard the sound of Ms. Nakaki falling.

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Sahwit
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: It was the kind of sound I never want to remember again...{nl}it was incredibly loud.

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(If that was the sound of Ms. Nakaki falling,{nl}then it must have been around 10:05 PM...)

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {color:lightblue}(That means the time is completely different{nl}from the sound Maggey said she heard...)
{updateEvidence:loud_sound,loud_sound_updated,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}"Loud Sound" updated in the Court Record.

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(All right. I think that's everything for here.)

Office_evidence_loud_sound.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_loud_sound.text: {color:lightblue}(Once I have enough information,{p:150} I'll head to court.{nl}I'll bring the truth to light there!){setState:office_done,true}{jump:Office_Default}{sectionEnd}

Office_evidence_default.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_default.text: {blip:0,false}{color:lightblue}(He doesn't seem to have any idea.)

Office_evidence_default.name: Phoenix
Office_evidence_default.text: {color:lightblue}(I feel like there are still things I have to ask him about.{nl}I should investigate somewhere else and come back later.){sectionEnd}
